name: A Ace Bus Co Ace Bus Co
recent_news: FMCSA shows A Ace Bus Charter Inc (USDOT 1341047) is actually HQ'd in Chantilly/Clifton, VA — not Maryland; operates 14 power units / 20 drivers as interstate for-hire passenger carrier; Conditional safety rating as of 05/11/2026. The MD listing with 866 toll-free appears to be a stale directory record; not a Maryland-based school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a Maryland school-bus contractor — actually a small VA-based charter/passenger carrier with Conditional safety rating. No tuck-in fit for Summit.

name: W W Berry Transportation
districts_or_customers: SAU 36 / Whitefield Elementary; Lancaster-area schools and Northern NH school districts; bus schedules referenced for Groveton/Lancaster region
recent_news: FMCSA snapshot (Jun 2026) shows W.W. Berry's Transportation Inc operating 54 power units, 65 drivers, Satisfactory safety rating, ~463K miles in 2025; founded 1974 by Wallie Berry, incorporated 2002; long-tenured family-owned operator in Northern NH posting active 2025-26 school bus schedules.
fit_notes: Genuine independent family-owned school-bus operator with 50+ bus fleet — meaningful tuck-in scale for Summit. Founded 1974, owner-led (Wallie Berry), likely 70s-age principal = high succession signal. Northern NH rural footprint is geographic edge but real platform-scale add.

name: Touchwood Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: Baltimore-area school bus transportation (likely Baltimore City Public Schools / private/charter routes)
recent_news: Legal name appears as Torchwood Transportation Inc (MD corp file D12613162); operates from 1244 Woodbourne Ave, Lower Northwood Baltimore; established 2008; classified as school bus transportation service. No M&A or acquisition news found.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-operator Baltimore school bus contractor (≤5 employees, ~$140K rev). Likely a single MD-route operator — too small to be a meaningful tuck-in on its own, but could be a roll-up candidate if Summit is consolidating Baltimore City SPED/charter contracts.

name: Isd Transportation LLC
recent_news: Listed address 1581 Wheelock Ln #305, Saint Paul MN 55117 is a residential condo unit (apartment building) — strongly suggests this LLC is a one-vehicle/owner-operator or shell entity rather than a yard-based school-bus contractor. No FMCSA, no website, no phone listed in source data. Name suggests possible school-district-contracted sub or NEMT van; no operating presence identifiable in public sources.
fit_notes: Not a credible tuck-in target — registered at a residential condo address, no traceable yard, fleet, website, or district contracts. Likely a sole-proprietor van/NEMT-style operator; too small and unverifiable for Summit consideration.

name: Burlington School Trnsprtn

districts_or_customers: Burlington School District RE-6J (~700 K-12 students, 4 bus routes serving 80+ students daily)
